meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup (Beginner Guide)
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' block. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to ship SaaS MVPs faster. A high-density checklist for modern AI-driven freelancers.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. Use Antigravity to generate market-validated SaaS blueprints and Claude Code to execute the boilerplate instantly. By automating the architectural scaffolding and core feature implementation, you turn a blank IDE into a functional MVP in minutes, allowing you to focus on high-value client customizations.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the freelancer's graveyard. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the client pipeline, but you're paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' syndrome. It’s not a lack of creativity; it’s a failure of systems. When you spend hours debating the 'perfect' project, you aren't building—you're stagnating.

True mastery comes from mastering the loop of rapid prototyping. By integrating Antigravity for conceptual ideation and Claude Code for terminal-based execution, you bypass the friction of initial setup. This guide is your blueprint to turning vague concepts into deployable assets before the coffee gets cold.

steps.title: Define Market-Validated Niches
steps.description: Use Antigravity to identify high-demand, low-competition SaaS micro-tools. This ensures your project solves a real problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current trends in freelance SaaS tools and generate 5 micro-SaaS ideas that solve specific, high-intent problems for small business owners.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project roadmap for a micro-SaaS based on the top-performing idea from my research.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Project Architecture
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation. Use Claude Code to create the folder structure and configuration files for a modern Next.js/Supabase stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a clean, scalable folder structure for a Next.js application including authentication, database integration, and API routes.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Design
steps.description: Don't write SQL by hand. Generate your database schema based on your project requirements to ensure type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema file for a user-centric SaaS app with subscription tiers and role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create schema.prisma file and run npx prisma db push'

steps.title: Execute Core Feature Logic
steps.description: Implement the primary business logic. Focus on the 'killer feature' that makes the tool indispensable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for a dashboard component that fetches and displays real-time user analytics from a Supabase backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the dashboard analytics service and UI component with error handling'

steps.title: Refine and Deploy
steps.description: Finalize the build and push to production. Speed is your competitive advantage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my current codebase for security vulnerabilities and suggest 3 high-impact performance optimizations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Perform security audit and prepare for Vercel deployment'

pro_tips: Always use the 'claude --verbose' flag to understand how the agent is making architectural decisions during the build.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'System Instructions'—save your best ones as templates in a dedicated Notion database.
When stuck, ask Claude Code to 'List the 3 most likely causes for this error' rather than just asking it to fix the code.
Use Antigravity to write your project's marketing copy while Claude Code handles the backend; this ensures your feature set matches your sales pitch.
Commit your code after every successful Claude Code block execution to maintain a granular, revertible history.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is running, implement a feedback loop by deploying to Vercel and sharing the link with three potential users. Use their feedback to iterate using Claude Code's patch functionality.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark. Leverage the tools that elite freelancers use to dominate the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
